meaning: n.<美>剥绒机,棉短线(轧棉后残留在棉籽上的)
examples: This paper studies fiber dimension of cotton linter, Chemical compositions and alkali-hydrogen peroxide pulping process.
As natural cellulose linter pulp raw materials, HEC is the name of a series of products after alkalization and etherification.
We mainly use cotton linter as raw material to produce cotton linters pulp, for industrial production of acetate, ether and nitrocellulose.
